postToolUse.bash: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(cpp|h|hpp)$' | while read f; do clang-format -i --style=file:workspace/.clang-format "$f" 2>/dev/null; done; true

preToolUse.bash: if git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'cmake/deps.cmake'; then echo 'BLOCK: cmake/deps.cmake has uncommitted changes. Confirm explicitly before editing this protected file.' && exit 2; fi; true
